infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Urban Quest needs camera access to take photos and videos for waypoint scouting.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Urban Quest needs microphone access to record audio notes for waypoint scouting.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Urban Quest needs photo library access to attach images and videos to waypoints.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Urban Quest uses your location while the app is open to detect when you reach quest waypoints and to anchor scouted waypoints to the real world.

plugins.userTrackingUsageDescription: Urban Quest uses your ad ID to show ads in free quests. Granting permission lets us show ads that are actually relevant; if you decline, you'll still see ads, just less targeted ones.

plugins.userTrackingPermission: Urban Quest uses your ad ID to show ads in free quests. Granting permission lets us show ads that are actually relevant; if you decline, you'll still see ads, just less targeted ones.
